race.comment: The most open race of the day. AIRWORTHY (13) pushed hard from a wide gate to lead last start only to feel the pinch in the closing stages over 1250m at Canterbury. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and will conserve a bit more energy today from a good gate and a long run to the bend. Ready to find peak form. SOCIABLE (10) made pleasing progress last time out at the second run of the campaign, closing hard but just missing behind the in-form Mrs Maree over 1100m here. Looks ideally placed out to this distance at the third run back. THE REPLICANT (11) gave away too much start when resuming over this course and distance last start. Has a tremendous top-three strike rate under today's setup. HIGH BLUE SEA (4) is a big chance dropping back to midweek company. THREE ARROWS (15) has found the line well in two runs this prep and is ready to peak now.
